zh.Forfar, Angus, Scotland, United Kingdom: 英國蘇格蘭安格斯福爾法爾
zh.Selkirkshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭澤爾吉爾可爾

zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Janet Douglas於1461年出生在英國蘇格蘭安格斯福爾法爾時，她的父親James Douglas Lord of DalKeith, First Earl Morton, Nineth Earl Douglas35歲，母親Princess Joan Stewart33歲。她於1481年2月1日與Patrick Hepburn 1st Earl of Bothwell結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1490年2月21日在英國蘇格蘭澤爾吉爾可爾享年29歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Janet Douglas于1461年出生在英国苏格兰安格斯福爾法爾时，她的父亲James Douglas Lord of DalKeith, First Earl Morton, Nineth Earl Douglas35岁，母亲Princess Joan Stewart33岁。她于1481年2月1日与Patrick Hepburn 1st Earl of Bothwell结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1490年2月21日在英国苏格兰澤爾吉爾可爾享年29岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Janet Douglas was born in 1461, in Forfar, Angus, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, James Douglas Lord of DalKeith, First Earl Morton, Nineth Earl Douglas, was 35 and her mother, Princess Joan Stewart, was 33. She married Patrick Hepburn 1st Earl of Bothwell on 1 February 1481. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 21 February 1490, in Selkirkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 29, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Janet Douglas est née en 1461, à Forfar, Angus, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, James Douglas Lord of DalKeith, First Earl Morton, Nineth Earl Douglas, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Princess Joan Stewart, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Patrick Hepburn 1st Earl of Bothwell le 1 février 1481. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 21 février 1490, à Selkirkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 29 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Janet Douglas 1461 in Forfar, Angus, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James Douglas Lord of DalKeith, First Earl Morton, Nineth Earl Douglas 35 und ihre Mutter Princess Joan Stewart 33. Sie hat am 1. Februar 1481 Patrick Hepburn 1st Earl of Bothwell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 21. Februar 1490 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Selkirkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Janet Douglas è nata il nel 1461 nel Forfar, Angus, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, James Douglas Lord of DalKeith, First Earl Morton, Nineth Earl Douglas, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Princess Joan Stewart, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Patrick Hepburn 1st Earl of Bothwell il 1 febbraio 1481. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 21 febbraio 1490, nel Selkirkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 29 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Janet Douglasが1461年にイギリススコットランドアンガスフォーファルで生まれた時，父James Douglas Lord of DalKeith, First Earl Morton, Nineth Earl Douglasは35歳，母Princess Joan Stewartは33歳であった。1481年2月1日にPatrick Hepburn 1st Earl of Bothwellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1490年2月21日にイギリススコットランドセルキルクシュアイアで29歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Janet Douglas(이)가 1461년 영국 스코틀랜드 앤구스 포파르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Douglas Lord of DalKeith, First Earl Morton, Nineth Earl Douglas(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Princess Joan Stewart(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1481년 2월 1일 Patrick Hepburn 1st Earl of Bothwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1490년 2월 21일 영국 스코틀랜드 셀커크실르에서 29세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Janet Douglas nasceu em 1461, em Forfar, Angus, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, James Douglas Lord of DalKeith, First Earl Morton, Nineth Earl Douglas, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Princess Joan Stewart, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Patrick Hepburn 1st Earl of Bothwell em 1 de fevereiro de 1481. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 21 de fevereiro de 1490, em Selkirkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 29 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Janet Douglas родилась в 1461 г. в местности форфар, ангус, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени James Douglas Lord of DalKeith, First Earl Morton, Nineth Earl Douglas было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Princess Joan Stewart, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Patrick Hepburn 1st Earl of Bothwell 1 февраля 1481 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 21 февраля 1490 г. в местности селкиркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 29 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Janet Douglas nació en 1461, en Forfar, Angus, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, James Douglas Lord of DalKeith, First Earl Morton, Nineth Earl Douglas, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Princess Joan Stewart, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Patrick Hepburn 1st Earl of Bothwell el 1 de febrero de 1481. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 21 de febrero de 1490, en Selkirkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 29 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
